subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Praise be to God for having guided thee unto His straight path and having acquainted thee with the Manifestation of His Self and the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی ان احمد الله بما هداک الی صراطه المستقیم و عرفک مظهر نفسه و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment
